hero.title: Find the Perfect Service Provider
hero.subtitle: Connect with verified professionals for cleaning, moving, renovation and more. Free quotes in minutes.
hero.searchPlaceholder: What service are you looking for?

cta.providerSubtitle: Join thousands of providers and get matched with new customers in your area.
cta.createFirstRequest: Create your first request and receive free quotes from verified professionals.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.pageSubtitle: Find qualified professionals in just a few simple steps. Free, fast, and secure.

step1.title: Submit Request
step1.description: Describe your needs and receive free quotes.

step2.title: Compare Offers
step2.description: Compare prices and reviews from verified providers.

step3.title: Book & Review
step3.description: Choose the best provider and share your experience.

detailedStep1.title: Describe Your Need
detailedStep1.description: Tell us what service you need. The more details you provide, the more accurate the offers you'll receive from our verified professionals.

detailedStep2.title: Receive Free Offers
detailedStep2.description: Get up to 5 personalized quotes from qualified providers in your area. Compare prices, reviews, and experience to find the perfect match.

detailedStep3.title: Choose & Book
detailedStep3.description: Select the provider that best meets your needs. Communicate directly, set a date, and get the job done professionally.

step4.title: Leave a Review
step4.description: Share your experience to help others make informed decisions and help providers build their reputation.

free.title: 100% Free
free.description: Submitting requests and receiving quotes is completely free. No hidden fees, no obligations.

verified.title: Verified Providers
verified.description: All our professionals are verified and reviewed by real customers, ensuring quality and reliability.

fast.title: Quick Responses
fast.description: Receive quotes within 24 hours. Most requests get responses in just a few hours.

secure.title: Secure & Safe
secure.description: Your data is protected. We only share your request with relevant providers in your area.

quality.title: Top Quality
quality.description: Get the best service quality from experienced professionals with proven track records.

local.title: Local Experts
local.description: Connect with trusted professionals in your area who know the local market and speak your language.

q1.question: How much does it cost to use Armut?
q1.answer: It's completely free for customers! You can submit requests, receive quotes, and communicate with providers at no cost. You only pay the provider for the service once you decide to book.

q2.question: How quickly will I receive offers?
q2.answer: Most requests receive the first offers within a few hours. Generally, you can expect to receive up to 5 quotes within 24 hours of submitting your request.

q3.question: Are the providers verified?
q3.answer: Yes! All providers on our platform are verified. We check their credentials and all reviews are from real customers who have used their services.

q4.question: Do I have to accept an offer?
q4.answer: No, there's absolutely no obligation. You can review all offers, ask questions, and only proceed if you find the right provider for your needs.

q5.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
q5.answer: Customer satisfaction is our priority. If you experience any issues, please contact our support team. We'll work with you and the provider to resolve the matter.

footer.description: The leading platform for services in Germany.

becomeProvider.subtitle: Reach thousands of potential customers in your area and grow your business.

step1.title: Create Profile

step2.description: Get notified about relevant customer requests in your area.

step3.title: Send Offers
step3.description: Submit personalized quotes to potential customers.

step4.title: Grow Your Business
step4.description: Complete jobs and build your reputation with great reviews.

newCustomers.title: New Customers
newCustomers.description: Access thousands of potential customers actively looking for services.

flexible.title: Flexible Working
flexible.description: Choose your own working hours and only accept jobs that fit your schedule.

freeRegistration.title: Free Registration
freeRegistration.description: Sign up for free - you only pay when you win a job.

easyManagement.title: Easy Management
easyManagement.description: Manage all your requests, bookings, and customers in one place.

buildReputation.title: Build Your Reputation
